title: Build Student Management Platform for Cognify

requirements.text: Create student registration system allowing new students to sign up with name, class (6-10), contact number, email, and parent contact information
acceptanceCriteria: Students can register with all required fields
Form validation ensures valid email and phone formats
Successful registration creates a student profile
Registration is accessible without authentication

requirements.text: Implement student profile management where students can view and update their personal information, enrolled courses, and contact details
acceptanceCriteria: Authenticated students can view their complete profile
Students can edit contact information and parent details
Profile displays current enrolled courses
Changes are persisted in the backend

requirements.text: Build course enrollment system supporting courses for Class 6-8 (Foundation Building: Mathematics, Science, Basic Concept Development, Activity-Based Learning) and Class 9-10 (Board Preparation: Complete NCERT Coverage, Mathematics, Science including Physics/Chemistry/Biology)
acceptanceCriteria: Students can browse available courses filtered by their class level
Each course displays name, description, and class level
Students can enroll in multiple courses
Enrollment is tracked per student
Students cannot enroll in courses outside their class level

requirements.text: Create attendance tracking system where admins can mark daily attendance for each student by course, and students can view their attendance history and percentage
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can mark attendance (present/absent) for students by date and course
Students can view their attendance records with dates
Attendance percentage is calculated and displayed
Attendance data is organized by course
Historical attendance records are preserved

requirements.text: Implement test results and progress tracking where admins can record test scores for weekly tests, and students can view their test history, scores, and performance trends
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can create tests with name, date, subject, and maximum marks
Admins can record scores for each student per test
Students can view all their test results with scores and dates
System displays performance trends or average scores
Test results are organized by subject/course

requirements.text: Build admin dashboard with role-based authentication providing overview of total students, course enrollments, attendance statistics, and test performance summaries
acceptanceCriteria: Admin role can access the dashboard after authentication
Dashboard displays total number of registered students
Dashboard shows enrollment counts per course
Dashboard includes attendance statistics (overall percentage, trends)
Dashboard displays recent test performance summaries
Regular students cannot access admin features

requirements.text: Implement admin student management interface allowing admins to view all students, search/filter by name or class, view detailed student profiles including enrollment and performance data, and edit student information
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can view a list of all registered students
List includes search by name and filter by class functionality
Clicking a student shows detailed profile with courses, attendance, and test scores
Admins can edit student contact information and class level
Changes are saved and reflected immediately

requirements.text: Create admin course management interface allowing admins to add new courses, edit course details (name, description, class level), and view enrollment counts per course
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can create new courses with name, description, and class level
Admins can edit existing course information
Course list shows current enrollment count for each course
Course changes are persisted and immediately visible to students

requirements.text: Design a modern, education-focused visual theme with a professional academic aesthetic using warm, welcoming colors (avoiding blue and purple), clean typography suitable for an educational institution, and consistent spacing and layout patterns that convey trust and clarity
acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme uses warm, professional tones appropriate for education
Typography is clear and readable for all age groups
Layout creates a sense of structure and academic professionalism
Design is consistent across all pages and components
Visual style supports the 'From Rote to Reason' mission

constraints: Use Internet Identity for authentication (admin and student roles)
All student and course data must persist in the Motoko backend
Admin features must be restricted to admin role only
nonGoals: Online payment processing for course fees
Real-time chat or messaging between students and faculty
Integration with external school management systems

required: Cognify logo featuring book and lightbulb symbolizing understanding over memorization (cognify-logo.dim_200x200.png)
Hero section background with abstract educational pattern in warm tones (hero-bg.dim_1200x600.png)
Dashboard illustration showing student progress analytics (dashboard-hero.dim_800x500.png)
